title: pseudoselago gracilis
intro: Pseudoselago gracilis, also known as the slender false selago, is a flowering plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pseudoselago gracilis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form.
